# Let's open the provided file and read its content to compute indices.
path = "/mnt/data/file-Ds1SCd7V1YrS7ieFpNync7-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:500]

# Let's find all aya_start and aya_end ranges.
import re

# Find all occurrences of (aya_start) and (aya_end)
start_positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r"\(aya_start\)", text)]
end_positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r"\(aya_end\)", text)]
start_positions, end_positions, len(start_positions)

spans_aya = []
for s, e in zip(start_positions, end_positions):
    s_text = s + len("(aya_start)")
    aya_text = text[s_text:e]
    spans_aya.append((s_text, e, aya_text))
spans_aya

# Find all occurrences of the hadith phrase without quotes
hadith_phrase = "إنما بعثت معلما"
occurrences = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(re.escape(hadith_phrase), text)]
occurrences, len(occurrences)

hadith_spans = [(pos, pos+len(hadith_phrase), hadith_phrase) for pos in occurrences]
hadith_spans

# Let's find the four reference ayat.
ref_text = text

# 1) Find the segment after "كقوله تعالى: " and before " غافر:"
start1 = ref_text.find("وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ")
end1 = ref_text.find(" غافر:")
start1, end1, ref_text[start1:end1][:120]

start2 = ref_text.find("يا أَبَتِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ")
end2 = ref_text.find(" يوسف:", start2)
start2, end2, ref_text[start2:end2]

start3 = ref_text.find("وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ الْبَناتِ")
end3 = ref_text.find(" النحل:", start3)
start3, end3, ref_text[start3:end3]

start4 = ref_text.find("فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ")
end4 = ref_text.find(" الواقعة:", start4)
start4, end4, ref_text[start4:end4]

import json

citations = []

# Add aya spans from markers
for s, e, matn in spans_aya:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": s,
        "span_end": e,
        "span_text": matn,
        "citation_type": "Aya"
    })

# Add hadith spans
for s, e, matn in hadith_spans:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": s,
        "span_end": e,
        "span_text": matn,
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth"
    })

# Add reference ayat
ref_ayas = [
    (start1, end1, ref_text[start1:end1]),
    (start2, end2, ref_text[start2:end2]),
    (start3, end3, ref_text[start3:end3]),
    (start4, end4, ref_text[start4:end4]),
]
for s, e, matn in ref_ayas:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": s,
        "span_end": e,
        "span_text": matn,
        "citation_type": "Aya"
    })

# Sort citations by start index
citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x["span_start"])
print(len(citations_sorted))
print(json.dumps({"citations": citations_sorted}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

# Show context around hadith occurrences
for s,e,_ in hadith_spans:
    snippet = text[s-10:e+10]
    print(repr(snippet))

# Search for any other quotes that might be hadith or ayah
import re
# Get all sequences within double quotes
quotes = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(r"\"([^\"]+)\"", text)]
len(quotes), quotes[:5]

for start, end, s in quotes:
    print(start, end, s)

def verify(citations):
    for c in citations:
        s, e, t_sub = c["span_start"], c["span_end"], c["span_text"]
        extracted = text[s:e]
        if extracted != t_sub:
            print("Mismatch at", s, e)
            print("Expected:", repr(t_sub))
            print("Extracted:", repr(extracted))
            return False
    return True

verify(citations_sorted)

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":278,"span_end":396,"span_text":"وَقُلْ إِنِّي نَذِرٌ لِّرَبِّي وَلَا أَقُولُ لِلَّذِينَ تَجْهَرُ بِالْعَمَلِ السَّيِّئَاتِ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":458,"span_end":473,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":627,"span_end":791,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ * فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ السَّاجِدِينَ * وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِينُ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":852,"span_end":867,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1017,"span_end":1070,"span_text":"وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ الذِّكْرَىٰ تَنْفَعُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1131,"span_end":1146,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1298,"span_end":1450,"span_text":"وَلَا تَسْتَوِي الْحَسَنَةُ وَلَا السَّيِّئَةُ ۚ ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ فَإِذَا الَّذِي بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَهُ عَدَاوَةٌ كَأَنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1507,"span_end":1522,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1763,"span_end":1925,"span_text":"وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ يا قَوْمِ اتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ الرَّشادِ* يا قَوْمِ إِنَّما هذِهِ الْحَياةُ الدُّنْيا مَتاعٌ وَإِنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ دارُ الْقَرارِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1998,"span_end":2098,"span_text":"يا أَبَتِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ أَحَدَ عَشَرَ كَوْكَباً وَالشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَرَ رَأَيْتُهُمْ لِي ساجِدِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2314,"span_end":2380,"span_text":"وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ الْبَناتِ سُبْحانَهُ وَلَهُمْ ما يَشْتَهُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2420,"span_end":2500,"span_text":"فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ* وَإِنَّهُ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
